sujet: shandong xinxu group - Company Overview

contenu.question: What is Shandong Xinxu Group and what does it do?
contenu.reponse: Shandong Xinxu Group, founded in 2010 in Shandong, China, is a leader in manufacturing equipment for batteries, industrial batteries, energy solutions, and oilfield equipment. We operate in R&D, production, and international trade, serving industries such as battery manufacturing, forklifts, photovoltaic energy, and energy storage. With 5 factories in Zibo, Dongying, and Yantai, we export to over 40 countries, including clients like Toyota, Linde, and ARBL. Visit www.xinxugroup.cn for more information.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Company History

contenu.question: What is the history of Shandong Xinxu Group?
contenu.reponse: Founded in 2010 in Shandong, Shandong Xinxu Group began with R&D and manufacturing of equipment for lead-acid batteries. In 2014, we merged with Yantai Goldentide Unikodi Battery Co., Ltd to produce traction and industrial batteries. In 2016, we established branches for environmental solutions, lithium batteries, nuclear equipment, and a joint venture with CSIC for oilfield equipment. In 2019, an international trade branch integrated exports. Today, we operate in over 40 countries.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Mission and Vision

contenu.question: What is the mission and vision of Shandong Xinxu Group?
contenu.reponse: Our mission is to provide innovative and sustainable solutions for battery manufacturing, energy, and industrial equipment. Our vision is to be a globally recognized leader for quality, innovation, and environmental responsibility.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Global Presence

contenu.question: Where does Shandong Xinxu Group operate globally?
contenu.reponse: We operate in over 40 countries, including India, Pakistan, Mexico, France, Russia, Bulgaria, Tunisia, Morocco, and Brazil. Our clients include ARBL, Volta, Eastman, Jungheinrich, Hyster, Linde, and Toyota. We have overseas offices and after-sales service centers in India, Pakistan, Tunisia, Bulgaria, and Mexico. Contact sales@xinxugroup.cn or visit www.xinxugroup.cn/global.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Quality Certifications

contenu.question: What quality certifications does Shandong Xinxu Group hold?
contenu.reponse: We hold ISO 9001:2015, CE, TLC, and classification certifications, ensuring our products meet international standards for quality, safety, and performance.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Sustainability Initiatives

contenu.question: What sustainability initiatives does Shandong Xinxu Group undertake?
contenu.reponse: Through our ‘Green Xinxu’ program, we aim to reduce carbon emissions by 20% by 2030. We use energy-efficient processes, recyclable materials, and comply with environmental regulations. More information at www.xinxugroup.cn/sustainability.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Innovation and R&D

contenu.question: What are Shandong Xinxu Group’s innovation and research initiatives?
contenu.reponse: We invest heavily in R&D, with a center in Shandong employing engineers working on battery equipment, lithium technologies, and sustainable energy solutions. We collaborate with Shandong University and hold several patents. Details at www.xinxugroup.cn/rd.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Industrial Partnerships

contenu.question: Which industries does Shandong Xinxu Group collaborate with?
contenu.reponse: We collaborate with leaders in battery manufacturing (ARBL, Eastman), forklifts (Jungheinrich, Linde), photovoltaic energy, and energy storage. Our products are used in UPS projects, power systems, and solar plants. See www.xinxugroup.cn/partners.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - International Partnerships

contenu.question: What international partnerships has Shandong Xinxu Group established?
contenu.reponse: We have partnerships with companies in Europe, Japan, and North America for technology transfer, distribution, and research on materials and automation. These collaborations strengthen our global reach. See www.xinxugroup.cn/global-partners.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Industries Served

contenu.question: Which industries does Shandong Xinxu Group serve?
contenu.reponse: We serve: 1) Battery manufacturing; 2) Forklift industry; 3) UPS and power systems; 4) Photovoltaic energy; 5) Energy storage; 6) Oil industry; 7) Nuclear sector. Our solutions are tailored to each sector’s needs. Visit www.xinxugroup.cn/industries.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Manufacturing Capabilities

contenu.question: What are Shandong Xinxu Group’s manufacturing capabilities?
contenu.reponse: We have 5 factories: 2 in Zibo (assembly, molds, spare parts), 2 in Dongying (oilfield equipment, lead-acid batteries), and 1 in Yantai with 4 workshops (lead-acid batteries, lithium, nuclear products). Our capabilities include die-casting, CNC machining, automated assembly, and rigorous testing. Details at www.xinxugroup.cn/manufacturing.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Product Catalog

contenu.question: What types of products does Shandong Xinxu Group offer?
contenu.reponse: Our products include: 1) Battery equipment (die-casting, filling systems, assembly lines); 2) Batteries (forklifts, industrial, OPzV, OPzS, lithium); 3) Energy solutions (solar panels, heat recovery systems); 4) Oilfield equipment; 5) Turnkey battery plant projects. View the catalog at www.xinxugroup.cn/products or in the app, ‘Categories’ section.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Flagship Products

contenu.question: What are Shandong Xinxu Group’s flagship products?
contenu.reponse: Our best-sellers include: 1) Die-casting machines; 2) Lithium and lead-acid batteries (OPzV, OPzS series); 3) Automated packaging lines; 4) Solar panels. Explore them in the app, ‘Products’ section, or at www.xinxugroup.cn/products.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Partner Program

contenu.question: How does the Xinxu Partner Program work?
contenu.reponse: The Partner Program offers: 1) Discounts (15-25%); 2) Access to Partner Packs; 3) 24/7 priority technical support; 4) Co-marketing; 5) Early product access; 6) Free training; 7) Dedicated manager. Requirements: business verification, minimum purchase volume. Apply via the app, ‘Become a Partner’ section, or www.xinxugroup.cn/partner-application.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Partner Packs

contenu.question: What are Xinxu Partner Packs?
contenu.reponse: Partner Packs are pre-configured kits for battery manufacturing, energy, or oilfield equipment, offering: 1) Up to 30% savings; 2) Extended warranty (18 months); 3) Priority delivery. Exclusive to partners (ROLE_USERPARTNER). View in the app, ‘Packs’ section, or www.xinxugroup.cn/partner-packs.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Client Types

contenu.question: What are the different client types at Shandong Xinxu Group?
contenu.reponse: We serve: 1) Standard clients (ROLE_USER): access to catalog, promotions, regular support; 2) Partners (ROLE_USERPARTNER): 15-25% discounts, pack access, priority support, flexible payments. Compare at www.xinxugroup.cn/account-comparison.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Features

contenu.question: What features does Shandong Xinxu Group’s mobile app offer?
contenu.reponse: The app offers: 1) Catalog with AR visualization; 2) Advanced search with filters; 3) Secure cart and checkout; 4) Favorites; 5) Order tracking; 6) Profile/address management; 7) Personalized notifications; 8) Integrated chatbot; 9) ‘Packs’ section for partners; 10) Complaint management; 11) Secure payment. Available in French, English, Chinese on iOS/Android. Download at www.xinxugroup.cn/mobile-app.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Navigation

contenu.question: How do I navigate Shandong Xinxu Group’s mobile app?
contenu.reponse: To navigate: 1) **Bottom bar**: Home, Cart, Packs (partners), Notifications, Profile; 2) **Home**: view categories, promotions, search; 3) **Profile**: access ‘My Orders’, ‘Saved Addresses’, ‘Edit Profile’, ‘Complaints’, ‘Logout’; 4) **Categories**: click the ☰ icon top-left; 5) **Filters**: click the 🔍 icon top-right in search to filter by category/price; 6) **Chatbot**: via ‘ChatbotScreen’. Check the guide in settings or at www.xinxugroup.cn/mobile-app/help.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - View Orders

contenu.question: How can I view my order history?
contenu.reponse: To view your orders: 1) Click the ‘Profile’ icon 👤 bottom-right; 2) Select ‘My Orders’; 3) Choose an order to view details (‘Order Details’), including items, status, and tracking. Contact logistics@xinxugroup.cn for updates.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Reservation Timer

contenu.question: What does the timer in the app panel mean?
contenu.reponse: The timer shows the remaining time (30 minutes) for a product reserved from stock. The product is locked for you during this time. If you don’t complete the purchase, it returns to stock in the ‘Products’ table. If you place an order, it’s permanently removed. Check your cart to confirm before the timer expires.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Search and Filters

contenu.question: How can I search for products and apply filters?
contenu.reponse: To search: 1) On ‘Home’, use the search bar to enter a name, category, or keyword; 2) To filter, click the 🔍 icon top-right in ‘Search Results’; 3) Apply filters by category, price, or other criteria. To view categories, click the ☰ icon top-left.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Login and Registration

contenu.question: How can I log in or register in the app?
contenu.reponse: On the start screen, click ‘Login’ or ‘Register’. Follow the instructions to create an account or log in. After registration, verify your email via ‘Email Verification’. Download the app at www.xinxugroup.cn/mobile-app.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Password Reset

contenu.question: How can I reset my password in the app?
contenu.reponse: On the login screen, click ‘Forgot Password’. Enter your email to receive an OTP code, then set a new password via ‘Reset Password’. Contact support@xinxugroup.cn if needed.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Email Verification

contenu.question: How can I verify my email address in the app?
contenu.reponse: After registration, a verification email is sent. Click the link or enter the code in ‘Email Verification’. Check your spam folder if needed.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Profile Management

contenu.question: How can I manage my profile in the app?
contenu.reponse: Click the ‘Profile’ icon 👤 bottom-right. Edit your details via ‘Edit Profile’, manage addresses (‘Saved Addresses’), view order history (‘My Orders’), or file a complaint (‘Complaints’).

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Complaint Management

contenu.question: How can I file a complaint in the app?
contenu.reponse: In ‘Profile’, select ‘Complaints’, then ‘Create a Complaint’. Submit details and photos if needed. Track status in ‘Complaints’. Response within 48 hours. Contact support@xinxugroup.cn for assistance.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Cart and Checkout

contenu.question: How can I manage my cart and check out?
contenu.reponse: Click ‘Cart’ to add/remove items. To purchase: 1) Go to ‘Checkout’; 2) Select an address (‘AddDeliveryAddress’ if needed); 3) Choose a payment method (bank transfer, L/C, Alipay, WeChat Pay); 4) Confirm. Partners have flexible options via ‘PackScreen’ (📦 icon).

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Notifications

contenu.question: How can I view my notifications?
contenu.reponse: Access ‘Notifications’ in the bottom bar to see updates on orders, promotions, and messages. Unread notifications are marked with a badge. Enable them in settings to stay informed.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Product Search

contenu.question: How can I search for products in the app?
contenu.reponse: Use the search bar on ‘Home’ to find products by name, category, or keyword. Results appear in ‘Search Results’. Filter via the 🔍 icon top-right.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Address Management

contenu.question: How can I manage my delivery addresses?
contenu.reponse: In ‘Profile’, access ‘Saved Addresses’ to add (‘Add Delivery Address’), edit, or delete addresses. Select an address during checkout.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Favorites

contenu.question: How can I manage my favorite products?
contenu.reponse: Access ‘Favorites’ in the bottom bar to view/manage saved products. Add items from ‘Item Details’. Remove or view via ‘Favorites’.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Payment

contenu.question: How can I make a payment?
contenu.reponse: At ‘Checkout’, select a payment method (bank transfer, L/C, Alipay, WeChat Pay). Follow instructions in ‘Payment’ to complete. Partners have flexible terms. Contact support@xinxugroup.cn for assistance.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Online Sales App - Order Details

contenu.question: How can I view the details of an order?
contenu.reponse: In ‘Profile’, select ‘My Orders’, then an order to view details (‘Order Details’): items, status, tracking. Contact logistics@xinxugroup.cn for updates.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Order Process

contenu.question: How do I place an order with Shandong Xinxu Group?
contenu.reponse: 1) Log in to the app or www.xinxugroup.cn; 2) Browse the catalog (☰ icon top-left for categories); 3) Add to cart; 4) Proceed to ‘Checkout’, select address/payment; 5) Confirm. Track in ‘My Orders’ (Profile > My Orders). Partners access packs via ‘PackScreen’ (📦 icon).

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Custom Manufacturing Services

contenu.question: How can I request custom manufacturing services?
contenu.reponse: Submit your requirements via www.xinxugroup.cn/custom or contact sales@xinxugroup.cn. Provide detailed specifications. Quote within 3 business days. Partners receive preferential rates.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - International Shipping

contenu.question: Does Shandong Xinxu Group ship internationally?
contenu.reponse: Yes, we ship to over 40 countries by sea, air, or land. Costs and timelines are in your quote. Track via ‘My Orders’ or www.xinxugroup.cn/track. Partners get priority delivery.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Delivery and Timelines

contenu.question: What are the delivery timelines?
contenu.reponse: Timelines: 1) Stock: 3-5 days (China), 7-14 days (Asia), 14-21 days (Europe/Americas); 2) Standard: 2-4 weeks; 3) Custom: 6-12 weeks. Track via ‘My Orders’ or www.xinxugroup.cn/track. Express options: urgent.delivery@xinxugroup.cn.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Order Tracking

contenu.question: How can I track my order?
contenu.reponse: Receive a tracking number via email after shipment. Use it at www.xinxugroup.cn/track or in ‘My Orders’. Contact logistics@xinxugroup.cn for updates.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Payment Methods

contenu.question: What payment methods are accepted?
contenu.reponse: We accept bank transfers (T/T), letters of credit (L/C), Alipay, WeChat Pay (domestic clients). Terms: 30% deposit, 70% before shipment. Partners have flexible options. Details in ‘Checkout’ or www.xinxugroup.cn/payment.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Returns and Refunds

contenu.question: What is the return and refund policy?
contenu.reponse: Returns within 30 days for defective/incorrect products. Use ‘Create a Complaint’ or contact support@xinxugroup.cn. Refunds/replacements within 14 days after inspection.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Warranty and Maintenance

contenu.question: What is the warranty and maintenance policy?
contenu.reponse: One-year warranty on defects (up to 3 years for premium equipment). Maintenance: free support, spare parts (10 years), preventive contracts, on-site interventions. Priority for partners. Contact support@xinxugroup.cn or ‘Complaints’.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Technical Support

contenu.question: What technical support is available?
contenu.reponse: 24/7 support for partners, comprehensive documentation, installation videos, monthly webinars, remote diagnostics. Access via ‘Complaints’, www.xinxugroup.cn/support, support@xinxugroup.cn, or +86-531-1234-5678. After-sales centers in India, Mexico, Tunisia, Bulgaria, Pakistan.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Customer Service

contenu.question: How can I contact customer service?
contenu.reponse: Contact us via: 1) Email: xinxuafrica@zbxinxu.com; 3) Phone: 29 015 294 (8 AM-8 PM CST); 4) Form: http://www.zbxinxu.com/en/contact.html; 5)

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Training and Documentation

contenu.question: What training and documentation resources are available?
contenu.reponse: Resources: multilingual manuals, training videos, monthly webinars, on-site/remote training, online knowledge base. Partners access a dedicated portal. Contact training@xinxugroup.cn or visit www.xinxugroup.cn/training.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Promotions and Special Offers

contenu.question: How can I stay informed about promotions?
contenu.reponse: Enable notifications in the app (‘Notifications’), subscribe to the newsletter (www.xinxugroup.cn/newsletter), or follow us on WeChat, LinkedIn, Facebook. Partners receive exclusive offers. See www.xinxugroup.cn/promotions.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Bulk Orders

contenu.question: How can I place a bulk order?
contenu.reponse: Contact sales@xinxugroup.cn or apply as a partner via ‘Become a Partner’ in the app for preferential rates and priority processing.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Safety Standards

contenu.question: What safety standards do your products follow?
contenu.reponse: Our products comply with ISO 9001:2015, CE, TLC, and classification standards. Rigorous testing (X-ray, ultrasound) ensures safety and performance. Details at www.xinxugroup.cn/standards.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Jobs and Careers

contenu.question: What job opportunities does Shandong Xinxu Group offer?
contenu.reponse: Opportunities in engineering, manufacturing, sales, R&D. View openings and apply at www.xinxugroup.cn/careers or send your CV to hr@xinxugroup.cn.

sujet: shandong xinxu group - Mobile App FAQ

contenu.question: Where can I find the FAQ for the mobile app?
contenu.reponse: Visit our help center with guides and videos at www.xinxugroup.cn/mobile-app/help or in the app’s settings. Covers accounts, orders, payments, and partner features.
